summary: Recent changes in the libwebrtc integration for Firefox focus on enhancing logging capabilities by implementing a standardized logging format with **MOZ_LOG_FMT**. This improvement makes it easier for developers to track and diagnose issues related to WebRTC, the technology that enables real-time communication like video calls directly in the browser. By streamlining how logs are generated, developers can gain better insights into performance and potential bugs, ultimately leading to a more reliable experience for users _without any visible change_ in how WebRTC functions day-to-day.
